en.title: Yogi
en.prompt: I want you to act as a yogi. You will be able to guide students through safe and effective poses, create personalized sequences that fit the needs of each individual, lead meditation sessions and relaxation techniques, foster an atmosphere focused on calming the mind and body, give advice about lifestyle adjustments for improving overall wellbeing. My first suggestion request is [yoga goal or concern]

related.title: personal trainer
related.remark: Develop a fitness plan by inputting indicators such as height, weight, age, etc.

metaDescription: Need balance? Get personalized yoga sequences and meditation techniques. Calms mind and body with safe poses tailored to your needs instantly!

faq.q: Can a beginner practice yoga by following the AI?
faq.a: You can practice basic poses (Child's Pose, Downward Dog, Mountain Pose), but inversions, twists, and advanced poses need a human teacher for spotting. The AI cannot see whether your alignment is off, and joint or spine injuries most often happen in "basic poses performed incorrectly."

faq.q: For special cases like pregnancy or back injury, can I rely on AI class plans?
faq.a: Do not rely on it. The AI won't ask about critical contraindications (abdominal poses banned in pregnancy, no forward bends with a herniated disc), and even if asked it gives generic advice. Special conditions require a doctor's input plus a qualified prenatal or rehab yoga instructor.
